snippet: The department's Digital Learning policy has been updated and from 2027, schools must not invite parents or carers to purchase or bring their own digital devices (BYOD) for Foundation to Grade 6 students to use at school. The Parent Payment policy, guidance and templates will be updated in 2026 to reflect this change. Schools may communicate parent payment arrangements using any communication tool that is suitable for their school context, if communication is consistent with the Parent Payments Policy. This includes letters in the post, email, or using third party communication tools. Schools must develop parent payment requests using one or more of the department’s parent payment arrangement templates: Parent payment arrangements template (secondary schools) (DOCX) (staff login required) External Link Parent payment arrangements template (specialist schools) (DOCX) (staff login required) External Link . Schools must follow the following communication requirements when inviting parents to make a financial contribution or payment to the school: .
